/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -W -Wall -Wno-sign-compare -fdiagnostics-color=always -O2 -g1   -Wl,--build-id -rdynamic CMakeFiles/range_map_test.dir/tests/range_map_test.cc.o  -o range_map_test liblibbloaty.a third_party/protobuf/cmake/libprotoc.a third_party/re2/libre2.a third_party/capstone/libcapstone.a third_party/googletest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest_main.a third_party/googletest/googlemock/libgmock.a -lpthread third_party/protobuf/cmake/libprotobuf.a -lpthread third_party/googletest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest.a -pthread
